translation.literal_translation: And thus, because assignment of quarters such as beings etc. is coherent. (26)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.26: Brahman-reference is supported by coherence of bhutadi-pada-vyapadesha.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: The sutra compresses the prior argument that the quarter-structure coheres only on a Brahman reading.
The whole Gayatri passage is read as internally continuous, not as a loose list of unrelated labels.
The interpretive weight now falls on the total pattern of the passage, not on isolated terms.

lexical_notes.gloss: cessation of atomistic or special-part speculation
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: The passage is not handled as a puzzle of parts but as a coherent Brahman disclosure.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit truncated source lines and precise phrasing in the jyotis/gayatri bridge and Kausitaki prana section (1.1.084-1.1.095).
